name: docs
description: The documentation site for the TimeTiles project.

scripts.lint: oxlint --config ../../.oxlintrc.json . && mkdir -p .lint-results && eslint app content scripts --cache --format json --output-file .lint-results/latest.json; eslint app content scripts --cache && SKIP_EXTERNAL=1 tsx scripts/check-links.ts
scripts.lint:all: eslint app content scripts --cache && tsx scripts/check-links.ts
